mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_practice_log (user_id, score_id, duration_mins, current_bpm, thoughts) VALUES (#{userId}, #{scoreId}, #{durationMins}, #{currentBpm}, #{thoughts})
mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.score_id, l.duration_mins, l.current_bpm, l.thoughts, l.log_time, s.title, s.artist FROM t_practice_log l INNER JOIN t_score s ON l.score_id = s.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY l.log_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id AS scoreId, s.title AS scoreTitle, s.artist AS scoreArtist, SUM(l.duration_mins) AS totalMins, COUNT(*) AS sessions FROM t_practice_log l INNER JOIN t_score s ON l.score_id = s.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY s.id, s.title, s.artist ORDER BY totalMins DESC
SELECT DATE(log_time) AS day, SUM(duration_mins) AS totalMins FROM t_practice_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND log_time >= #{since} GROUP BY DATE(log_time) ORDER BY day ASC
